description: guard: SessionStart provisions the managed runtime and reports drift; PreToolUse blocks package installs that cannot be scanned.

hooks.command: sh -c 'PY="${JIG_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/jig}/bin/python3"; [ -x "$PY" ] || { echo "guard: provisioning managed Python runtime (first run, one moment)..." >&2; sh "$(dirname "$1")/setup.sh" 1>&2 || true; }; if [ -x "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "$1" preflight; fi; printf %s "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"guard inactive: could not provision the managed Python runtime (offline?). It retries next session, or run scripts/setup.sh manually.\"}}"' jig-guard "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/guard.py"
sh -c 'PY="${JIG_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/jig}/bin/python3"; if [ -x "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "$1"; fi' jig-guard "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/guard.py"
